'''Evan Asani''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]].

==Biography==
Raised within the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], Asani eventually [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduated]] from the academy and was selected by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. Accompanying this master for years on assignments and missions from the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], Asani eventually took the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and passed to become a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. At some point in his training, Asani crafted for himself a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] with a green [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]].<ref name="SWTCW" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] Asani was stationed at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] Temple when [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] assembled a [[Jedi assault team/Legends|task force]] to rescue the captive Knight [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], Padawan [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], and [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] from their [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] captors. Arriving on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] with two hundred other Jedi, Asani fought for his life in the [[Petranaki arena]] as the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] unveiled their [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|droid army]].<ref name="SWTCW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Evan Asani only appeared as a playable character in the multi-player mode of the video game [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']] and not within the actual story itself. Save for his appearance, name, lightsaber color, and time of existence, nothing else is known about him.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]] {{C|multiplayer mode only}}
